objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=15)
- adx(period=22)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 30
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.75
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR stop-loss (2.75x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Fallback contractuel: proposition générée automatiquement pour maintenir la progression quand la sortie LLM n'est pas exploitable.

code.validation_error: [SIG001] Constantes booléennes True/False interdites dans les signaux.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy focuses on breakout trading in the Donchian channel with ADX to confirm trend and ATR for stop loss and take profit. Stop-loss is set at 2.75x multiple of ATR while take-profit is at 3.5x. The strategy will be tested using market APTUSDC, timeframe 1h with both long and short positions based on closing price crossing Donchian upper and lower bands along with ADX crossing above 30, or the opposite conditions for going short. A fallback strategy has been proposed in case of poor results.
[Backup plan] If the results are negative (negative return), we will try to make adjustments such as changing the parameters like period of Donchian channel and ADX, use different indicators for entry signals or change stop-loss and take-profit multiple. For mediocre results (low Sharpe ratio), we could adjust risk parameters like increasing TP multiple while maintaining stop loss at 2.75x ATR. Alternative approaches can be trying trading pairs with better performance, using machine learning to predict the future trend of the market or exploring other technical indicators for entry signals.

iterations.hypothesis: La combinaison de RSI, Bollinger et Donchian permettra d'améliorer les résultats en éliminant les faux positifs lors du trading dans des marchés en mode range.

code.validation_error_retry: [SIG001] `for i in range(...)` interdit dans la logique Builder.

iterations.hypothesis: A trend following strategy using Bollinger Bands and Donchian channels as filters for breakout entries followed by ADX to confirm the direction of the trend, with ATR based risk management. This approach reduces false signals in ranging markets.
